build_up_complex.description: Editing the metal complex builder (PSO swarm, ligand placement)
steps: 1. Grep for the target function name in build_up_complex.py
2. Read only the function body (offset+limit)
3. Check _pso_fitness, _compute_clash_score, _prepare_force_field_terms for side effects
4. Edit, then run: pytest tests/ -x -q -k 'not browser' in background
5. If touching VdW/clash logic: verify radii are VdW (not covalent), threshold 75% of sum
key_invariants: PSO places ligands as rigid bodies (6 DOF) — never modify intra-ligand topology
VdW radii for clash detection, NOT covalent radii
Procrustes init for bidentate+ ligands (>=2 donors → SVD alignment)

steps: 1. Grep config.py for the relevant key/function
2. Check _parse_control_file (line ~353) for parsing flow
3. Check validate_control_text (line ~501) for validation rules
4. Run pytest tests/test_co2_control_overrides.py tests/test_functional_contracts.py -x -q
key_invariants: Config dicts are mutable — changes propagate. Be careful with shared state
OCCUPIER_parser is separate from main CONTROL parser

steps: 1. Grep cli.py for the subcommand name
2. Each subcommand is a _run_*_subcommand function
3. Check _load_full_cli_dependencies (line 24) for lazy imports
4. Run pytest tests/test_cli_*.py -x -q
key_invariants: CLI uses lazy loading — heavy imports are deferred

orca_recovery.description: Modifying error detection or retry logic
steps: 1. OrcaErrorType enum (line 28) defines all known error types
2. OrcaErrorDetector (line 62) matches output patterns to error types
3. RecoveryStrategy (line 275) maps errors to fix actions
4. OrcaInputModifier (line 684) applies the actual input file changes
5. Run pytest tests/test_orca_workflow_contracts.py -x -q
key_invariants: Recovery must work for both local and SLURM backends
Never modify the original input — create a new input for retry

steps: 1. This is the largest module (18073 lines) — always Grep first
2. Main classes: _HybridHaptoFragment, _PrimaryOrganometalModule
3. Entry point: _try_multiple_strategies (line ~627)
4. Metal handling: _manual_metal_embed (line ~835), _normalize_metal_smiles (line ~1573)
5. Hapto groups: _find_hapto_groups (line ~1944), _apply_hapto_approximation (line ~2087)
key_invariants: Multiple fallback strategies: RDKit → OpenBabel → manual embed
Metal bonds converted to dative bonds via _convert_metal_bonds_to_dative
Hapto approximation is optional — check _hapto_approx_enabled flag

dashboard_agent.description: AI agent tab in the dashboard
steps: 1. tab_agent.py is 7435 lines — always Grep first
2. Entry point: create_tab (line 931)
3. Grep for specific widget or callback names
4. Run pytest tests/test_agent_*.py -x -q
1. search_docs with the specific method name + property (max 2 calls)
2. If hits found: read_section on the most relevant match
3. search_calcs for benchmark calculations matching the system
4. Synthesize answer with ORCA keyword, basis set, solvent, and doc citation
5. If no hits: fall back to ORCA manual + delfin_methodology, state limitations explicitly
key_invariants: Always cite doc_id + section_id when quoting
Give concrete ORCA input snippet when possible
State method limitations (e.g. charge-transfer failure of pure GGAs)
